calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

James Coy Driscoll, Esq. appeared for plaintiff DCFS USA, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Nora Gin.
Default was entered against defendant on February 10, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismised on February 11, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff DCFS USA, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Nora Gin as follows:

Damages/Principal - $37,256.04.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,541.88.
Attorney's Fees - $3,725.60.
Costs - $395.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $44,918.52.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2009 Continued To Jul-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
